query:
INSERT INTO federation_signing_keys (
                server_name,
                key_id,
                secret_key,
                public_key,
                created_ts,
                expires_at,
                key_json,
                ts_added_ms,
                ts_valid_until_ms
            )
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9)
